title: Digital Fast Track: caseworker guidance
body: "The Digital Fast Track service (DFT) allows a customer to apply for a passport online through our Digital Customer Services (DCS) online application system, where they will receive their new passport within 7 calendar days, by secure delivery.  This guidance tells HM Passport Office staff who can use the service and also explains:   how customers can apply what services are available to the customer what information customers need to provide  "
